name: Swedish Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cabbage leaves in a large kettle of boiling water until they become limp, then drain.
2. In a bowl, combine beaten egg, milk, finely chopped onion, salt, pepper, ground beef or turkey, and cooked rice.
3. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the meat mixture onto the center of each cabbage leaf.
4. Fold in the sides of the cabbage leaf and roll up the ends to enclose the filling.
5. Place the cabbage rolls in a crockpot.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together tomato sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Pour the sauce over the cabbage rolls.
8. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours.
